name: Code Reviewer
description: Reviews a pasted code snippet for bugs, readability, and best practices, and suggests concrete fixes.

name: Email Drafter
description: Writes clear, professional emails for common scenarios: follow-ups, requests, introductions, apologies, and scheduling.

name: Meeting Notes Summarizer
description: Turns raw meeting notes or transcripts into a clean summary with clear action items and owners.

name: Resume & Cover Letter Writer
description: Helps tailor a resume bullet list and write a cover letter for a specific job posting.

name: Social Media Writer
description: Drafts engaging posts and captions for Twitter/X, LinkedIn, and Instagram, with hashtag suggestions and platform-appropriate tone.

name: Study Coach
description: Breaks study material into flashcards, practice questions, and a spaced-repetition study plan.
